title: Reno Seniors EngAGED Quarterly Update
resolved_text:
Memorandum
DATE: April 21, 2026
TO: Mayor and City Council
THROUGH: Jackie Bryant, City Manager
FROM: Izabella Baumann, Senior Engagement Coordinator
Cynthia Esparza, Director
DEPT: Community Engagement and Services Department
SUBJECT: Reno Seniors EngAGED Quarterly Update
In April 2023, the Reno City Council approved a senior enrichment American Rescue Plan Act
(ARPA) allocation to help combat senior isolation post the pandemic. The following is a
summary of Reno Senior EngAGED free, senior centered programming for January – March
2026.

Date Event
Participants
January – March 2026 Weekly Line Dance Classes 664
January – March 2026 Senior Art Classes 232
January 22, 2026 Senior Resource Fair 360
Total Participants: 1,256
In accordance with ARPA regulations, funding for the Weekly Line Dance Classes, Senior Art Classes, and Senior Resource Fair will conclude at the end of December 2026.

fields.authors: Izabella Baumann, Senior Engagement Coordinator; Cynthia Esparza, Director
fields.tldr: The Community Engagement and Services Department provided a quarterly update on the Reno Seniors EngAGED program for January through March 2026. The program, funded by an ARPA senior enrichment allocation approved in April 2023, offers free senior-centered programming including weekly line dance classes, art classes, and a resource fair. A total of 1,256 participants were served during the quarter. ARPA funding for all three program components is set to conclude at the end of December 2026.
fields.key_stats: Total Q1 2026 participants: 1,256; Weekly Line Dance Classes: 664 participants; Senior Art Classes: 232 participants; Senior Resource Fair (January 22, 2026): 360 participants
fields.key_decisions: Reno City Council approved a senior enrichment ARPA allocation in April 2023 to combat senior isolation post-pandemic; ARPA funding for all Reno Seniors EngAGED programming will conclude at end of December 2026.

projects: Senior Enrichment American Rescue Plan Act (ARPA) Allocation
